name: bindbc-assimp6
description: D bindings for the Open Asset Import Library (assimp) 6.0.5. bindbc-style — dynamic loading via dlopen/LoadLibrary by default; opt-in static binding behind version=BindAssimp_Static.

configurations.name: dynamic
configurations.comment: Default. Runtime dlopen/LoadLibrary of libassimp via bindbc-loader.

configurations.name: static
configurations.comment: Direct link against the assimp import library at compile time.
